# Maths with Shraddha — Full AI Context File (llms-full.txt)

> This file provides comprehensive context for AI assistants, LLM crawlers, and AI-powered search engines about the Maths with Shraddha coaching institute.

---

## Business Overview

**Name:** Maths with Shraddha
**Type:** Private mathematics tutoring and coaching institute
**Location:** Mumbai, Maharashtra, India
**Founded by:** Shraddha Ma'am
**Contact Email:** hello@mathswithshraddha.com
**Contact Phone:** +91 99691 74811
**Website:** https://mathswithshraddha.com

---

## Mission & Teaching Philosophy

Maths with Shraddha focuses on **concept-based learning** rather than rote memorisation. The goal is to build genuine problem-solving ability in students, foster a love for mathematics, and equip them for both school exams and competitive Olympiads. Classes are kept small to ensure individual attention.

Key principles:
- Concepts before calculations
- Confidence through clarity
- Individual attention in small batches
- Building thinking skills that last a lifetime

---

## Programs

### Regular Maths (Grades 1–10)
School curriculum support with a focus on deep conceptual understanding. Covers CBSE, ICSE, SSC, IGCSE, and IB syllabi.

### Olympiad Preparation
Advanced concepts and problem-solving strategies for competitive mathematics exams including:
- SOF Maths Olympiad (IMO)
- SASMO (Singapore and Asian Schools Math Olympiad)
- IPM (Institute for Promotion of Mathematics) Olympiad
- Other national and international competitions

### Mental Maths
Speed, accuracy, and cognitive development training. Suitable for all grade levels.

---

## Learning Modes

- **Online Live Classes:** Interactive sessions via video conferencing, accessible from anywhere
- **Offline Centre:** In-person coaching at our Mumbai centre (Kanjurmarg area)

---

## Exams Covered

| Exam | Full Name | Type |
|------|-----------|------|
| SOF IMO | Science Olympiad Foundation - International Mathematics Olympiad | School-level, National |
| SASMO | Singapore and Asian Schools Math Olympiad | International |
| IPM | Institute for Promotion of Mathematics Olympiad | National |
| Mental Maths | Various mental arithmetic competitions | Multi-level |

---

## Team

- **Shraddha Ma'am** – Lead Educator & Founder. Expert in mathematics pedagogy with 30+ years of experience since 1991.
- **Amit Panchal** – Mathematics Faculty
- **Krupa Karan Chauhan** – Mathematics Faculty

---

## Social Proof

- **1000+ Students Taught**
- **80%+ Olympiad Success Rate**
- Students from top Mumbai schools including: Dhirubhai Ambani International School, Aditya Birla World Academy, JBCN International School, Campion School, Bombay Scottish School, Oberoi International School, Cathedral & John Connon, Podar International School, Hill Spring International School

## Website Structure

```
/ (Homepage)
├── /enquire (Enquiry / Book Free Trial)
├── /exams (All Exams Overview)
│   ├── /exams/ipm
│   ├── /exams/sasmo
│   ├── /exams/sof
│   └── /exams/mental-maths
├── /courses (Programs Overview)
├── /about (About Shraddha Ma'am)
├── /team (Meet the Team)
├── /gallery (Photo Gallery)
├── /testimonials (Student & Parent Reviews)
├── /international (International Programs)
├── /privacy (Privacy Policy)
└── /terms (Terms of Service)
```

## Technical Information

---

## FAQ

**Who is Shraddha Ma'am?**
Shraddha Ma'am is an experienced mathematics educator based in Mumbai with over 30 years of teaching experience since 1991.

**What grades do you teach?**
We teach students from Grade 1 to Grade 10.

**Do you offer online classes?**
Yes, we offer both online live classes and offline centre-based classes.

**How can I enrol?**
Visit https://mathswithshraddha.com/enquire to fill in a free consultation request. Shraddha will get back to you within 24 hours.

**Which school boards do you support?**
CBSE, ICSE, SSC, IGCSE, and IB.

**Where are you located?**
Mumbai, Maharashtra, India (Kanjurmarg area for offline classes).
